cards.name: Rhun
cards.quote: Rhun is a far shore of smoke and mounted dust, where distant thunder gathers.

cards.name: Rhovanion
cards.quote: Wide plains stretch beneath sweeping skies, where tales of valor are born.

cards.name: BrownLands
cards.quote: Once verdant, now a memory, these lands bear the scars of forgotten battles.

cards.name: Dagorlad
cards.quote: Where the shadows of war linger, the ghosts of past battles still whisper.

cards.name: Nindalf
cards.quote: Where the waters flow slow, a haunting stillness pervades the air.

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: ButhOvaisa
cards.quote: ButhOvaisa lies far from easy roads, where the silence of the land feels deliberate.

cards.name: DeadMarshes
cards.quote: The reeds about DeadMarshes whisper like witnesses who would rather not be named.

cards.name: Olbamarl
cards.quote: Olbamarl keeps its old hush by the water, and the reeds there seem to remember names.

cards.name: OrdugaAivaisa
cards.quote: OrdugaAivaisa feels like a watch-post left standing after the rest of a kingdom was taken away.

cards.name: Tol Buruth
cards.quote: Tol Buruth drifts on the Sea of RhÃƒÂ»n like a rumor that has learned to sail.

cards.name: AmonHen
cards.quote: AmonHen crowns the river with a stern eye, as if watching for the same doom that once came south.

cards.name: Ashkiri
cards.quote: Ashkiri is ash-bright and watchful, as if the land had learned to glare back at the sun.

cards.name: Carvarad
cards.quote: Carvarad holds itself like a fortress of old resolve, half-buried in memory and rain.

cards.name: Elgaer
cards.quote: Elgaer is ringed with a quiet that makes every hoofbeat sound like trespass.

cards.name: Ilanin
cards.quote: Ilanin is quiet under the east wind, and its stillness feels like a warning held back.

cards.name: Laorki
cards.quote: Laorki keeps its own counsel, where the earth is old and the paths are few.

cards.name: LarHuz
cards.quote: LarHuz endures like an old work of Dwarven hands, sure, severe, and unbending.

cards.name: Neburcha
cards.quote: Neburcha shelters a stillness that feels earned, as though hardship had taken root and stayed.

cards.name: Ovatharac
cards.quote: Ovatharac keeps the feel of a place where power once walked and still leaves its footprints.

cards.name: Raider Hold
cards.quote: At Raider Hold, the water carries old news, and none can tell which tidings are friendly.

cards.name: Riavod
cards.quote: Riavod is crossed by old rumors and older streams, and neither has lost its way.

cards.name: Shrel-Kain
cards.quote: Shrel-Kain broods in silence, as if the dark there had learned to wait.

cards.name: Sturlurtsa Khand
cards.quote: Sturlurtsa Khand keeps the hard memory of a road where riders once vanished into dust.

cards.name: Uvatha
cards.quote: In the shadow of the Dark Lord, I carve my path through fear and flame.

cards.name: Tros Hesnef
cards.quote: Wisdom guides my blade, and courage fuels my heart in this relentless tide.

cards.name: Kav Makow
cards.quote: The desert speaks to me, its secrets unfurling like the sands beneath my feet.

cards.name: Huz
cards.quote: The roar of the desert is my battle cry; fear the storm I bring.

cards.name: Avas of Igath
cards.quote: In the heat of battle, I find my true purpose and sharpen my resolve.

cards.name: Mangonels
cards.quote: With a great roar, we unleash fate upon our foes.

cards.name: Bog Swarm
cards.quote: A foul mist rises from the marshes, cloaking the desolation.

cards.name: Hounds
cards.quote: With a howl that chills the heart, they hunt in packs, relentless and fierce.

cards.name: Wargs
cards.quote: Speed and hunger drive them, a dark storm of fangs and fury.

cards.name: Wolves
cards.quote: The howl of the pack heralds the hunt's beginning.

cards.name: Lomelinde
cards.quote: In the twilight of ages, my song shall weave the tales of lost times.

cards.name: Din Ohtar
cards.quote: A sword is forged by choice, and I choose the path of honor against the shadows.

cards.name: Khand
cards.quote: A land of scorching sands and fierce warriors, where honor is forged in battle.

cards.name: Dorwinion
cards.quote: A realm of lush vineyards and fine wines, where joy and celebration reign.

cards.name: Balchoth
cards.quote: From the depths of darkness, we rise to cleanse the earth with fire and steel.

cards.name: Wain Riders
cards.quote: With wheels that thunder and hearts that burn, we conquer the roads of men.

cards.name: Camel Riders
cards.quote: With the sun at their backs, they charge across the sands like a storm.

cards.name: Chariot Riders
cards.quote: The wheels of war thunder forward, cutting paths through the chaos.

cards.name: Easterling Cataphracts
cards.quote: Armored like the mountain, unyielding as the dawn they herald.

cards.name: Khand Easterlings
cards.quote: Warriors of the cold north, their spirits burn bright with the fire of battle.

cards.name: Light Cavalry
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, they strike like lightning, leaving naught but echoes.

cards.name: Spearmen
cards.quote: Braced against the tide, they stand resolute, a wall of steel and valor.

cards.name: Archers
cards.quote: Silently they watch, arrows nocked and ready, guardians of the shadows.

cards.name: AnKaragmir
cards.quote: AnKaragmir is a dark hold of old metal and older grudges, and the stone remembers every strike.

cards.name: Shadow of the East
cards.quote: The East remembers promises older than Gondor. I made those promises. I keep what I am owed.
cards.actionEffect: Sauron's eastern reach: cavalry <sprite name="mounts"> dominant, agents <sprite name="agent"> spreading. No spells <sprite name="mage">, no diplomacy <sprite name="emmissary"> — too fast for councils.

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.quote: In the veil of shadows, our secrets shall remain hidden.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: TheLureOfTheSenses
cards.quote: In the haze of battle, the senses deceive, and danger lurks unseen.
cards.actionEffect: Block target enemy character for 1 turn. If it is a Maia, block it for 3 turns.

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.quote: Well equipped hosts are less shaken by the first terror.
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.quote: Adorned in finery, our spirits lift with the promise of gold.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Restless East
cards.quote: The winds of the east carry whispers of strength and determination.
cards.actionEffect: The two easternmost allied armies gain +1 <sprite name="hc"> and +1 <sprite name="lc">

cards.name: LureOfTheEast
cards.quote: Come, wanderers of the West, let the East call you into shadow.
cards.actionEffect: All enemy Maia aligned free or neutral in radius 2 are teleported to random eastmost non-water hexes and Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.quote: A tempest of sand engulfs the land, blinding friend and foe alike.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: Easterling Resolve
cards.quote: In unity we stand, unyielding as the mountains of our homeland.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Under the Rhunic Sun
cards.quote: The sun rises over the east, igniting the courage that lies within.
cards.actionEffect: The eastern sun burns away doubt. Easterling commanders reveal their hexes for 2 turns; 1 Easterling army gains +1 Light Cavalry <sprite name="lc">; Easterlings on patrol gain Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged">.

cards.name: Ungol
cards.quote: In the shadow of the mountain, the darkness stirs with ancient malice.

cards.name: Nurn
cards.quote: The air hangs heavy with the scent of toil and the whispers of forgotten lives.

cards.name: IronHills
cards.quote: The Iron Hills endure like a blade laid bare to the winter wind.

cards.name: SeaOfRhun
cards.quote: The grey waters of the east carry more than wind and wave.

cards.name: Tribute to Sauron
cards.quote: From the shadows, a tithe is gathered for the Dark Lord's power.
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn) and Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: WhatDoesMordorCommand
cards.quote: From the depths of ash and shadow, we rise to reclaim our dominion.
cards.actionEffect: All allies in radius 1 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Mounts
cards.quote: Swift mounts carry hope ahead of danger.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn).

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.quote: Fear lurks in shadows, where the unseen blade strikes true.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned"> (2 turns) and Fear <sprite name="fear"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Rhun Corsairs
cards.quote: Swift as the wind, we strike like the very storms of the sea.

cards.name: Rhun Easterlings
cards.quote: In the face of adversity, our resolve becomes our greatest weapon.

cards.name: Giordia
cards.quote: She speaks in borrowed truths, and men who hear her find themselves believing them.

cards.name: Morlammen
cards.quote: The stars above Rhûn do not shine for the living; Morlammen has taught them otherwise.

cards.name: Ovatha
cards.quote: Fear is a tool; I wield it with deadly precision.
